subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-05-18
subcodes.first_line: Mr Hoar is a sincere, true, upright Bahá'í. I have tested him and have not found him wanting. I have a way of testing the people which always shows their real character. Mr Hoar is a righteous, just, honest man.
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
